web-services.description: Legacy web services running via a docker compose stack. The compose folder has all the docker files. Currently deployed on osiris via Docker. Provided as context for future migrations into the nunix flake, with a native NixOS module first approach. Migration will be incremental; over time all services should migrate into the flake. Ignore the scripts directory.

nunix-secrets.description: Per-host secrets for the nunix flake (secrets.yaml under anubis, common, osiris, server). Used by the NixOS configuration, likely via sops-nix or similar. Reference for resolving secret names and structure during service migrations.
